seoTitle: New Italy vs New Lambton Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between New Italy and New Lambton Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: New Italy vs New Lambton Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in New Italy and New Lambton Heights.
heading: New Italy vs New Lambton Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between New Italy, New South Wales and New Lambton Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: New Italy has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to New Lambton Heights (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is New Italy or New Lambton Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: New Italy has a flood risk score of 33/100, while New Lambton Heights scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: New Italy scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. New Lambton Heights scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in New Italy or New Lambton Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. New Italy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
